name: Chicken Stir Fry
instructions: 1. Slice chicken breast into thin strips. 2. Heat oil in a wok over high heat. 3. Cook chicken 4–5 min until golden. 4. Add broccoli, bell pepper, and carrots; stir-fry 3 min. 5. Add soy sauce, garlic, and ginger; toss 1 min. 6. Serve over rice.

name: Greek Chicken Bowl
instructions: 1. Season chicken with oregano, lemon juice, garlic, salt, and pepper. 2. Cook in a skillet over medium-high heat 6–7 min per side. 3. Slice and serve over a base of quinoa. 4. Top with cucumber, tomatoes, olives, and red onion. 5. Drizzle with olive oil and a squeeze of lemon.

name: Pan-Seared Salmon with Asparagus
instructions: 1. Season salmon with salt, pepper, and lemon zest. 2. Sear in a hot skillet with olive oil, 4 min per side. 3. In the same pan, sauté asparagus with garlic for 3–4 min. 4. Squeeze lemon over everything and serve.

name: Ground Turkey Tacos
instructions: 1. Brown ground turkey in a skillet over medium heat, breaking up as it cooks. 2. Add taco seasoning and a splash of water; simmer 2 min. 3. Warm tortillas. 4. Fill with turkey, shredded cabbage, salsa, and lime juice.

name: Baked Lemon Herb Chicken
instructions: 1. Preheat oven to 400°F. 2. Rub chicken thighs with olive oil, lemon zest, garlic, rosemary, thyme, salt, and pepper. 3. Bake 35–40 min until cooked through. 4. Rest 5 min before serving.

name: Shrimp Fried Rice
instructions: 1. Cook rice and let cool (or use day-old rice). 2. Scramble eggs in a wok and set aside. 3. Stir-fry shrimp with garlic until pink, 2 min. 4. Add rice, soy sauce, sesame oil, and frozen peas; toss 3 min. 5. Fold in eggs and top with scallions.

name: Tuna Salad Lettuce Wraps
instructions: 1. Drain tuna and mix with diced celery, red onion, Dijon mustard, lemon juice, and olive oil. 2. Season with salt and pepper. 3. Spoon into large butter lettuce leaves. 4. Top with sliced avocado.

name: Beef and Broccoli
instructions: 1. Slice flank steak thin against the grain. 2. Marinate in soy sauce, cornstarch, and baking soda for 10 min. 3. Stir-fry beef in batches until seared; set aside. 4. Cook broccoli in the same pan 3 min. 5. Make sauce: soy sauce, oyster sauce, garlic, ginger, and a splash of water. 6. Combine everything and serve over rice.

name: Salmon Poke Bowl
instructions: 1. Cube sushi-grade salmon and marinate in soy sauce, sesame oil, and sriracha for 5 min. 2. Cook or microwave rice. 3. Build bowl: rice base, salmon, edamame, cucumber, avocado, shredded carrots. 4. Drizzle with extra sauce and top with sesame seeds and scallions.

name: Chicken Caesar Salad
instructions: 1. Pound chicken breasts thin and season with salt, pepper, and garlic powder. 2. Cook in a skillet 5–6 min per side; let rest and slice. 3. Toss romaine with Caesar dressing and Parmesan. 4. Top with sliced chicken and serve.

name: Turkey and Sweet Potato Skillet
instructions: 1. Dice sweet potatoes into 0.5-inch cubes. 2. Cook in a skillet with olive oil over medium heat 8–10 min until tender. 3. Add ground turkey and cook through, breaking apart. 4. Season with smoked paprika, cumin, garlic powder, salt, and pepper. 5. Add spinach and stir until wilted.

name: Chicken Fajita Bowl
instructions: 1. Slice chicken and bell peppers into strips. 2. Cook chicken with fajita seasoning in a hot skillet 6–7 min. 3. Add peppers and onion; cook 4 min more. 4. Serve over rice with black beans, salsa, and guacamole.

name: Baked Cod with Roasted Veggies
instructions: 1. Preheat oven to 400°F. 2. Toss zucchini, cherry tomatoes, and red onion with olive oil, salt, and pepper; spread on a baking sheet. 3. Lay cod on top; season with lemon zest, garlic, and herbs. 4. Roast 20 min until fish flakes and veggies are tender.

name: Egg and Veggie Scramble
instructions: 1. Heat olive oil in a non-stick skillet. 2. Sauté diced bell pepper, mushrooms, and spinach until softened, 3 min. 3. Push veggies to the side; add whisked eggs and scramble gently. 4. Fold everything together, season with salt, pepper, and red pepper flakes.

name: Smoky Ground Beef Tacos
instructions: 1. Brown ground beef with diced onion until cooked through; drain excess fat. 2. Add smoked paprika, cumin, garlic powder, chili powder, and salt; stir well. 3. Warm flour tortillas. 4. Fill with beef mixture, shredded lettuce, tomato, and lime juice.

name: Spinach and Mushroom Omelette
instructions: 1. Sauté sliced mushrooms and spinach in butter until softened; set aside. 2. Whisk eggs with a splash of water. 3. Pour into a non-stick skillet over medium heat. 4. When edges set, add filling and fold. 5. Top with feta crumbles.

name: Caprese Pasta
instructions: 1. Cook pasta according to package directions. 2. While hot, toss with olive oil, halved cherry tomatoes, fresh mozzarella, and fresh basil. 3. Season with salt, pepper, and balsamic glaze. 4. Serve warm or at room temperature.

name: Black Bean and Corn Quesadillas
instructions: 1. Mix black beans, corn, shredded cheese, and diced jalapeño. 2. Spread on one half of each flour tortilla; fold over. 3. Cook in a dry skillet over medium heat 2–3 min per side until golden and cheese melts. 4. Serve with salsa and sour cream.

name: Shakshuka
instructions: 1. Sauté diced onion and bell pepper in olive oil until soft. 2. Add garlic, cumin, paprika, and cayenne; cook 1 min. 3. Stir in crushed tomatoes and simmer 10 min. 4. Make wells in the sauce; crack eggs in. 5. Cover and cook 5–8 min until whites set. 6. Top with fresh parsley.

name: Pasta Primavera
instructions: 1. Cook pasta until al dente. 2. Sauté zucchini, bell pepper, cherry tomatoes, and asparagus in olive oil with garlic, 5 min. 3. Toss hot pasta with vegetables, a ladle of pasta water, Parmesan, and fresh basil. 4. Finish with lemon zest and black pepper.

name: Greek Salad with Feta
instructions: 1. Chop cucumber, tomatoes, and red onion; halve olives. 2. Toss everything with olive oil, red wine vinegar, dried oregano, salt, and pepper. 3. Top with crumbled feta. 4. Let sit 5 min for flavors to meld.

name: Black Bean Buddha Bowl
instructions: 1. Cook or microwave quinoa. 2. Roast sweet potato cubes in the oven at 400°F for 20 min. 3. Drain and season black beans. 4. Build bowl: quinoa, sweet potato, black beans, and shredded red cabbage. 5. Drizzle with tahini thinned with lemon juice and a splash of water.

name: Red Lentil Soup
instructions: 1. Sauté diced onion, carrots, and celery in olive oil until soft, 5 min. 2. Add garlic, cumin, coriander, and turmeric; cook 1 min. 3. Add rinsed red lentils and vegetable broth. 4. Simmer 25–30 min until lentils dissolve. 5. Blend half the soup for a creamy texture. 6. Finish with lemon juice and fresh parsley.

name: Chickpea and Spinach Curry
instructions: 1. Sauté diced onion and garlic in oil until golden. 2. Add ginger, curry powder, cumin, and garam masala; toast 1 min. 3. Add diced tomatoes and coconut milk; simmer 10 min. 4. Stir in chickpeas and spinach; cook 5 more min. 5. Serve over rice with fresh cilantro.

name: Crispy Tofu Stir Fry
instructions: 1. Press extra-firm tofu dry; cube and toss with cornstarch. 2. Pan-fry in oil until golden and crispy all over, 8 min. 3. Remove tofu; stir-fry bok choy, broccoli, and snap peas 3 min. 4. Add tofu back with a sauce of soy sauce, rice vinegar, sesame oil, and maple syrup. 5. Serve over rice.

name: Avocado Toast with Hemp Seeds
instructions: 1. Toast sourdough slices until golden. 2. Mash ripe avocado with lemon juice, salt, and red pepper flakes. 3. Spread on toast. 4. Top with hemp seeds, sliced cherry tomatoes, and a drizzle of olive oil.

name: Peanut Noodles with Vegetables
instructions: 1. Cook soba noodles per package; rinse under cold water. 2. Whisk peanut butter, soy sauce, rice vinegar, sesame oil, lime juice, and a splash of water into a smooth sauce. 3. Toss noodles with sauce, shredded carrots, cucumber, edamame, and scallions. 4. Top with crushed peanuts.

name: Sweet Potato and Black Bean Tacos
instructions: 1. Roast diced sweet potato with cumin, chili powder, and olive oil at 400°F for 25 min. 2. Warm black beans with garlic and a squeeze of lime. 3. Warm corn tortillas. 4. Build tacos with sweet potato, black beans, red cabbage slaw, and avocado. 5. Finish with lime juice and cilantro.

name: Quinoa Power Bowl
instructions: 1. Cook quinoa in vegetable broth for extra flavor. 2. Roast chickpeas with smoked paprika and olive oil at 400°F for 20 min until crispy. 3. Steam broccoli and kale. 4. Build bowl with quinoa, crispy chickpeas, broccoli, kale, and avocado. 5. Drizzle with lemon tahini sauce.

name: White Bean and Tomato Stew
instructions: 1. Sauté diced onion, garlic, and celery in olive oil until softened. 2. Add crushed tomatoes, white beans, vegetable broth, and Italian seasoning. 3. Simmer 20–25 min. 4. Stir in baby kale until wilted. 5. Season with salt, pepper, and a drizzle of good olive oil.

name: Edamame and Brown Rice Bowl
instructions: 1. Cook brown rice (or use microwaveable pouches). 2. Thaw edamame. 3. Slice cucumber and shred carrots. 4. Build bowl: rice, edamame, cucumber, carrots, and sliced avocado. 5. Dress with soy sauce, rice vinegar, and sesame oil. 6. Sprinkle with sesame seeds.

name: Oven-Baked Veggie Frittata
instructions: 1. Preheat oven to 375°F. 2. Sauté diced zucchini, bell pepper, and cherry tomatoes in an oven-safe skillet until soft. 3. Whisk eggs with milk, salt, pepper, and feta; pour over vegetables. 4. Cook on stovetop 2 min, then transfer to oven. 5. Bake 15–18 min until set.

name: Cheese and Veggie Stuffed Peppers
instructions: 1. Preheat oven to 375°F. 2. Cook brown rice; mix with sautéed mushrooms, spinach, and black beans. 3. Cut tops off bell peppers and remove seeds. 4. Fill peppers with rice mixture and top with shredded mozzarella. 5. Bake 35–40 min until peppers are tender and cheese is bubbly.

name: Overnight Oats with Berries
instructions: 1. Combine rolled oats, milk, Greek yogurt, chia seeds, and honey in a jar. 2. Stir well and refrigerate overnight (or at least 4 hours). 3. In the morning, top with fresh berries and a sprinkle of granola.

name: Tropical Smoothie Bowl
instructions: 1. Blend frozen mango, frozen banana, coconut milk, and protein powder until thick and smooth. 2. Pour into a bowl. 3. Top with sliced banana, coconut flakes, hemp seeds, and fresh berries.

name: Zucchini Noodles with Marinara
instructions: 1. Spiralize zucchini or use a vegetable peeler to make ribbons. 2. Sauté garlic in olive oil 1 min. 3. Add cherry tomatoes and cook until they burst, 5 min. 4. Add marinara sauce and heat through. 5. Toss with zucchini noodles for 1 min — just enough to warm them. 6. Top with fresh basil.

name: Egg Salad Lettuce Wraps
instructions: 1. Hard-boil eggs, peel, and chop. 2. Mix with diced celery, Dijon mustard, Greek yogurt or avocado mayo, salt, pepper, and fresh dill. 3. Spoon into butter lettuce cups. 4. Top with sliced cucumber and paprika.

name: Turkey and Vegetable Soup
instructions: 1. Sauté diced onion, carrots, and celery in olive oil until soft. 2. Add garlic, Italian seasoning, and chicken broth; bring to a simmer. 3. Add diced sweet potato and cook 15 min. 4. Add ground turkey and cook through, breaking apart. 5. Stir in kale and cook 3 min more. 6. Season and serve.

name: Grain Bowl with Lemon Tahini
instructions: 1. Cook farro per package instructions. 2. Roast diced beets and chickpeas with olive oil and cumin at 400°F for 20 min. 3. Make dressing: tahini, lemon juice, garlic, and water. 4. Build bowl: farro, beets, chickpeas, arugula, and cucumber. 5. Drizzle with tahini dressing.

name: Veggie Egg Fried Rice
instructions: 1. Beat eggs and scramble in a wok with a bit of oil; set aside. 2. Stir-fry diced carrots, peas, and corn in the same wok. 3. Add day-old rice and press into the hot pan; let sit 1 min. 4. Stir in soy sauce, sesame oil, and eggs. 5. Top with scallions and sesame seeds.

name: Spicy Shrimp Tacos
instructions: 1. Toss shrimp with chili powder, garlic powder, cumin, and olive oil. 2. Cook in a hot skillet 1–2 min per side until pink. 3. Warm corn tortillas. 4. Build tacos with shrimp, mango salsa, shredded cabbage, and a squeeze of lime.

name: Turkey Meatball Rice Bowl
instructions: 1. Mix ground turkey with garlic, onion powder, dried herbs, egg, and breadcrumbs. 2. Form into balls and bake at 400°F for 20 min. 3. Heat marinara sauce. 4. Serve meatballs over rice with sauce and a side of steamed broccoli.

name: Comforting Chicken and Rice Soup
instructions: 1. Sauté diced onion, carrots, and celery in olive oil until soft. 2. Add garlic, fresh thyme, and bay leaf; cook 1 min. 3. Add chicken broth and bring to a boil. 4. Add chicken breasts and simmer 20 min until cooked. 5. Remove chicken, shred, and return to pot with cooked rice. 6. Season and serve.
